title: Mobile user uninstalls the mobile app
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app uninstall changes user status from active to inactive on Lens tenant Device Users page
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the device is connected and paired to the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the device status is active.
4. On the Lens tenant web portal, go to Manage → Device Users page and confirm the user's status shows as 'Active'.
5. Uninstall the Poly Studio Mobile app from the mobile device.
6. Return to the Lens tenant web portal, Manage → Device Users page, and observe the user's status.
expected: The user's status on the Lens tenant (Manage/Device Users page) should remain 'Active' after uninstalling the Poly Studio Mobile app, as uninstalling the app should not affect the user's account status on the tenant.
